mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.title, n.content, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), '관리자') AS writerNickname, n.published_at AS publishedAt FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = n.writer_id WHERE n.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY COALESCE(n.published_at, n.created_at) DESC, n.notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.title, n.content, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), '관리자') AS writerNickname, n.published_at AS publishedAt FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = n.writer_id WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED'
